acts.title: The Bridge Keeps Its Dead
acts.goal: Recover the satchel and learn who reached the bridge first.
beats: Identify who reached the bridge first

acts.title: Ashes Beneath the Ledger
acts.goal: Trace the satchel through the smugglers and church agents using the frontier road.
beats: Win or survive the attention of the Sun Choir

acts.title: What Elira Carried
acts.goal: Learn what the satchel was protecting and who profits from keeping the ruin active.
beats: Break the cult's pact with the ruin
Choose which ally to betray or save

acts.title: Dawn at the Open Stone
acts.goal: Stop the midnight opening beneath the tower and decide who survives the truth.
beats: Stop the midnight opening beneath the tower
Decide who carries the ledger into dawn

main_antagonist.name: Ivara Kelm
main_antagonist.motivation: She wants to open the buried chamber fully and weaponize the ruin's prophetic residue before the Church can seize it.
main_antagonist.secret: Ivara arranged Elira's death only after Elira tried to destroy the ledger instead of delivering it.
main_antagonist.relationship_to_protagonist: She studied under the same survey master who once taught the protagonist's sibling.

driving_mystery: Who has been feeding the ruin with bodies, coin, and silence, and what did Elira die trying to keep contained?
hook: A dead ferryman, a recovered satchel, and survey marks leading away from the bridge force the protagonist to choose whether to walk away or follow the conspiracy immediately.
escalation_arc: The campaign rises from a local murder on a rain-soaked road into a conflict between smugglers, zealots, and ruin-cultists, ending with a public choice about what truth the frontier deserves.
